plugins.name: research-toolkit
plugins.description: Self-reflexive dialectical investigation protocols, frame rotation, iterative verification, STONK agent

plugins.name: vasana-system
plugins.description: Pattern recognition across unrelated contexts - observe, record, test, browse behavioral patterns

plugins.name: makers-toolkit
plugins.description: Build-discipline skills in command-with-reason register. system-pilot adapts the original Universal CLAUDE.md Protocol into intrinsic-motivation form for building deterministic systems. intrinsic-prompt-design is the meta-methodology of prompt design — how to write prompts that hold that discipline well, by giving the model reasons, substance, and explicit trust. Pair with research-toolkit:text-deconstruction for verification.

plugins.name: security-toolkit
plugins.description: Threat-detection and dangerous-action-blocking hooks: tiered prompt-injection detection (covers MCP tool outputs via the * matcher), block dangerous git operations (push to main, force push, reset --hard, --no-verify, etc.), and Desktop Commander input safeguards (block start_process and set_config_value).
